---
title: "Mary Adams"
---

## Mary Adams

**Dates:** (b. Truro 1831/2)

### Description

schoolmistress

### Biography

Mary Adams lived in Otterbourne 1862-71 and ran a small boarding school with her aunt Mary La Beaune (b. Middlesex 1820/1)

### Letters

- Letter from May 20th [1871?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from October 5, 1868
- Letter from June 25th 1862

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
